title: Pouvoirs australiens
text_preview: WHEREAS the Government of Australia and the Government of the Republic of France desire to conclude an Agreement concerning Collaboration on Defence Research and Technology: NOW THEREFORE THESE PRESENTS CERTIFY that the Honourable GORDON NEIL BILNEY, Minister of State for Defence Science and Personnel, has been duly named, constituted and appointed by the Government of Australia as its plenipotentiary and representa…

pages.text:
WHEREAS the Government of Australia and the Government

of the Republic of France desire to conclude an Agreement concerning Collaboration on Defence Research and Technology:

NOW THEREFORE THESE PRESENTS CERTIFY that the

Honourable GORDON NEIL BILNEY, Minister of State for Defence

Science and Personnel, has been

duly named, constituted and

appointed by the Government of Australia as its plenipotentiary and representative having full power and authority to sign the

Agreement for and on behalf of the Government of Australia.

IN WITNESS WHEREOE, I, GARETH JOHN EVANS, Minister of

State for Foreign Affairs and Trade, have hereunto set my hand and affixed my seal.

DoNE at (uber this 13"

One thousand nine hundred and ninety.

day of December,

Minister

of

State for

Foreign Affairs

and

Trade

of

Australia
